pull.title: test: Add missing self.options.timeout_factor scale in tool_bitcoin_chainstate.py
pull.body: Without the factor, the test may fail when run cross-arch, possibly with sanitizers. E.g. in qemu-aarch64 in docker in a x86-VM.

test: Add missing self.options.timeout_factor scale in tool_bitcoin_chainstate.py

Apply the timeout factor inside the add_block function.

Also, force named args for the two expected strings.

Also, add trailing comma for style.
